title: tetrapterys triopteris
intro: Tetrapterys triopteris is a plant species in the family Malpighiaceae, commonly known as the "Amazonian coffee plant" due to its caffeine content. Traditionally, the leaves and stems of Tetrapterys triopteris are used in folk medicine for their medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant's health benefits include treating fever, diarrhea, and respiratory issues, as well as being used as a diuretic to aid in urinary tract infections. Tetrapterys triopteris is often prepared as an infusion or decoction, or used as a tincture to harness its medicinal properties.
